title: rhamnus oleoides subsp. velutina
intro: Rhamnus oleoides subsp. velutina, also known as the Velvet Frangipani or Velvet Rhamnus, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to China and Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Rhamnus oleoides subsp. velutina is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
